styles.useWhen: AI analysis, diagnostic review, publishing checks, scoring, workflow automation, and tool-running moments.
styles.avoidWhen: The segment only needs a soft lightweight note or a non-technical emotional caption.
styles.motionProfile: Precise panel entrance, weak glow pulse, status chip update, restrained scan/progress effects inside cards only.
styles.safeZoneRule: Keep panels outside face, mouth, active hand gestures, and subtitle-safe area.

styles.useWhen: General keyword popups, process callouts, quote cards, skill/file callouts, and short explanatory overlays.
styles.avoidWhen: The segment needs dense metrics, terminal execution, or very soft glass-only treatment.
styles.motionProfile: Keyword-timed pop, slide, spring settle, short emphasis pulse, and semantic group hold.
styles.safeZoneRule: Use side or upper-safe placement and avoid large center cards over faces or subtitles.

styles.useWhen: Precise status cards, metrics, comparisons, workflow steps, and compact engineering-like explanations.
styles.avoidWhen: The message is narrative, soft, or only needs one lightweight statement.
styles.motionProfile: Tight row stagger, 1px border pulse, numeric/progress growth, and small metadata updates.
styles.safeZoneRule: Use compact side placement and keep grids away from face, mouth, gestures, and subtitles.

styles.useWhen: Lightweight overlays, soft key-point cards, side prompts, feature summaries, and ending skill/file callouts.
styles.avoidWhen: The segment needs dense logs, terminal rows, hard metrics, or strong diagnostic dashboard treatment.
styles.motionProfile: Soft slide/fade, subtle rim highlight, local shine on entrance, and calm hold.
styles.safeZoneRule: Keep cards airy and outside subtitle, face, and mouth safe zones.

styles.useWhen: Prompt, command, generation, verification, export, skill packaging, and AI agent execution moments.
styles.avoidWhen: The segment is not about a process, command, generation state, verification state, or automation step.
styles.motionProfile: Short type-in, status dot pulse, row completion check, and restrained command-card updates.
styles.safeZoneRule: Use compact terminal cards; never create full-screen code rain or long real terminal dumps.
